This means:", '', '\\[ N = 2 \\times 2012 - 1 = 4023 \\]', '', "This setup guarantees a resilient configuration against all possible arrangements invoked by \\(B's\\) strategy.", '', 'Thus, the least number of coins, \\( N \\), so that \\( A \\) can always ensure all boxes maintain at least one coin is:', '\\[ \\boxed{4023} \\]'], 'role': 'user', 'name': 'assistant'}
